question_template: Explain why submission {{submission_id}} is high risk based on available evidence.
how_to_select_submission_id: Use the highest-risk submission from your deterministic output.

question_template: Explain why submission {{submission_id}} is lower risk compared to others in the same batch.
how_to_select_submission_id: Use a low-risk submission from your deterministic output.
must_include: explicit uncertainty if evidence is incomplete

question_template: What event or payment history context is most relevant to submission {{submission_id}}?
how_to_select_submission_id: Use any submission in your top-20 explained set.

question_template: Explain risk for submission {{submission_id}} with weak or missing evidence.
how_to_select_submission_id: Pick a submission where profile/payment evidence is limited.
must_include: citations to whatever evidence is available

question_template: Re-run the explanation for submission {{submission_id}} and verify output consistency.
how_to_select_submission_id: Reuse one ID from q1 or q2.
